traits.name: Discipline
traits.description: Ability to consistently do what needs to be done despite discomfort or distraction.

traits.name: SelfAwareness
traits.description: Understanding of personal strengths, weaknesses, motivations, and emotional patterns.

traits.name: NeedForApproval
traits.description: Desire for validation and acceptance from others.

traits.name: RiskTolerance
traits.description: Willingness to take chances despite uncertain outcomes.
relationshipEffects: More likely to approach new people

traits.name: Kindness
traits.description: Desire to care for and help others.

traits.name: Honesty
traits.description: Tendency to be truthful and sincere.

traits.name: Loyalty
traits.description: Commitment to people, promises, and causes.

traits.name: Patience
traits.description: Ability to tolerate delays, frustration, and difficult situations without reacting impulsively.

traits.name: Determination
traits.description: Persistence when facing obstacles and setbacks.

traits.name: Independence
traits.description: Preference for relying on oneself rather than others.

traits.name: Adaptability
traits.description: Ability to adjust to changing circumstances.

traits.name: Confidence
traits.description: Belief in personal ability and worth.

traits.name: Empathy
traits.description: Ability to understand and relate to the feelings and experiences of others.

traits.name: Approachability
traits.description: How comfortable other people feel approaching and interacting with this person.

traits.name: Trust
traits.description: Willingness to believe in and rely on others.

traits.name: Optimism
traits.description: Expectation that future outcomes will generally be positive.
relationshipEffects: More willing to work through problems

traits.name: Resilience
traits.description: Ability to recover from setbacks and hardship.

traits.name: Sensitivity
traits.description: Intensity of emotional responses to experiences.
memoryEffects: Emotionally charged memories have stronger impact

traits.name: Anxiety
traits.description: Tendency to worry, anticipate problems, and feel uncertainty.

traits.name: EmotionalControl
traits.description: Ability to regulate emotional responses.
memoryEffects: Learning from emotional mistakes strengthens control

traits.name: Hopefulness
traits.description: Belief that life can improve and goals are achievable.
relationshipEffects: More likely to try relationships again after heartbreak

traits.name: SelfEsteem
traits.description: Overall perception of personal worth and value.

traits.name: Courage
traits.description: Ability to act despite fear or uncertainty.

traits.name: Reflection
traits.description: Tendency to think deeply about experiences and learn from them.

traits.name: Faith
traits.description: Reliance on spiritual or religious beliefs when navigating life.
memoryEffects: Can reframe painful memories into lessons

traits.name: SelfImprovement
traits.description: Desire to improve oneself through learning, growth, and personal development.
relationshipEffects: Attempts to become a better partner
memoryEffects: Failures can become motivation for growth

traits.name: SeekingSupport
traits.description: Willingness to seek help, advice, and emotional support from others.

traits.name: WorkFocus
traits.description: Tendency to cope with stress and emotions through productivity and work.

traits.name: Avoidance
traits.description: Tendency to avoid difficult situations, emotions, or decisions.

traits.name: Family
traits.description: Importance placed on family relationships and family well-being.

traits.name: Love
traits.description: Importance placed on romance, connection, and meaningful relationships.

traits.name: Career
traits.description: Importance placed on professional success and achievement.

traits.name: Money
traits.description: Importance placed on financial security, wealth, and income.
relationshipEffects: May evaluate relationships through financial impact

traits.name: Security
traits.description: Importance placed on stability, predictability, and safety.
memoryEffects: Unstable life events strengthen desire for security

traits.name: Freedom
traits.description: Importance placed on independence, choice, and autonomy.
memoryEffects: Memories of being controlled strengthen freedom value

traits.name: Adventure
traits.description: Importance placed on excitement, exploration, novelty, and new experiences.
relationshipEffects: May struggle with overly predictable relationships

traits.name: Community
traits.description: Importance placed on belonging, contributing, and maintaining connections within groups and society.

traits.name: Knowledge
traits.description: Importance placed on learning, understanding, discovery, and intellectual growth.
relationshipEffects: May seek knowledgeable partners and friends

traits.name: FaithValue
traits.description: Importance placed on spiritual beliefs, religious practices, and faith-based principles.
relationshipEffects: May seek partners with similar beliefs
May place importance on shared values
